title: astragalus rubellus
intro: Astragalus rubellus, also known as yellow milk vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus rubellus include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus rubellus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
